item.title: There's some tough decisions ahead...
item.description: Front Page Edit: I did not expect this to blow up as much as it did, so thanks I guess. Comment to vote ratio is kind of astronomical and there's more comments on this post than any other on the front page (at time of edit). I simply cannot keep up with them all anymore. And while there are decent arguments being made on both sides, it's mostly a bloodbath - you have been warned.
item.dc:creator: GlitchyMcGlitchface

item.title: Oh look family values Lauren Boebert had two abortions and worked as an escort.

item.title: Secret village discovered
item.description: A SECRET VILLAGE DISCOVERED In 1850, a Farmer Found a Secret Village Older Than The Great Pyramids of Egypt ‘In a small bay in Scotland, a well-kept secret is hidden among the green hills. For millennia, no one knew that this place ever existed. Time and weather buried it under the sand, but when a terrible storm swept over the Orkney Islands in 1850, an incredible secret was revealed... Within this rolling hillside is a perfectly preserved prehistoric village of Skara Brae. At first glance, it might not seem particularly impressive, but step inside and you'll be amazed at what you see. Thousands of years ago, it was a bustling society. The settlement consists of eight stone houses and was inhabited between roughly 3180 and 2500 B.C., making Skara Brae one of the oldest agriculture villages in the UK. Skara Brae has been called the “Scottish Pompeii” because the ancient monument is so well preserved. Archaeologists estimate that 50-100 people lived in the village. When the settlement was built, the houses were 1,500 meters from the sea. Now, the sea has dug closer to the village and the view from the settlement has changed from pastures to the sea. The houses were connected to each other by tunnels. Each house could be closed off with a stone door. In every room, there's always one bed bigger than the other, but no one knows why. Each room also contains cabinets, dressers, seats, and boxes for storage. These boxes were waterproof, suggesting that they might have stored live seafood for later consumption. The village also had a sewage system and each house had its own toilet. Some believe that the villagers were Picts, a people of unknown origin who settled in eastern and northern Scotland near the end of the British Iron Age. But archaeological findings have shown that the people who lived here could have lived been much earlier than that. And no one knows why the village was abandoned. But around 2500 B.C., ​​the Orkney Islands became cooler and wetter. Many theories speculate about how the people of Skara Brae met their fate; the most popular ones involve a violent storm.’
item.dc:creator: rippinro

item.title: 25 dream destinations I would like to visit.
item.description:
1. Rainbow Mountains in Zhangye Danxia Geological Park in the Gansu province.
2. Boa Vista, Cape Verde, Africa.
3. Baku, Azerbaijan.
4. Baobab Tree Forest, Madagascar.
5. Fanø Island, Denmark. Their Famous Kite Festival.
6. Cape Town, South Africa.
7. Bergen, Norway.
8. Lake Hillier, Middle Island, Australia.
9. Aurora Borealis, Alaska.
10. Yosemite National Park, California.
11. Waikiki, Hawaii.
12. Kerala, South India.
13. Mountain Lakes in Switzerland. There are over 1500s of them!
14. Pyramids, Egypt.
15. Dubai, UAE.
16. Nassau, Bahamas.
17. Eiffel Tower, Paris.
18. Nuuk, Greenland.
19. Great Wall of China.
20. Grand Canyon National Park, Arizona.
21. Emperor Penguins, Antarctica.
22. Dolomites, Italy.
23. Lupins Field in Mackenzie Basin, South Island, New Zealand.
24. Ladakh, North India.
25. Mount Everest, Tibet.
item.dc:creator: FireflyPixels

item.title: Wholesome Doggo Dump before I go to sleep
item.description:
He's better educated than me...
Nobody tell her
If I didn't know kids I'd be sure which one was chewing the furniture... Also time out next to an electric socket
Good boys on their road to be best boys
Pals
During the lockdowns, not all heroes wore labcoats (LAB coats, get it? hehe... I'll show myself out...)
Goldens am I right?
Ladies and gentlemen; the descendant of the mighty wolf
I'm trying to gather some help for my friend and his little princess to help her get better. We hoped that her status was resolved the last time we pushed for her to get better but unfortunately we did not make it. She lost one of her kidneys but we're hoping that was the problem we were looking for. If you can help out a bit with covering the mounting bill,please do. https://gofund.me/d8e3dd17 -------- Also if you have a pet that needs help and you have a campaign to help him/her, DM me and send some good proof plus the campaign. I will be setting up these kinds of posts for weeks probably and I would love to help someone else in need!
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead

item.title: Alexei Navalny vanished inside the Russian prison system
item.description: His lawyer visited him at the IK-2 colony located around 60 miles east of Moscow, and was told "there is no such convict," https://www.newsweek.com/navalny-putin-russia-kremlin-1715626
